title: Algorithm Visualizer
description: A Web application that allows people to visualize different path finding algorithms. Currently, the algorithms supported are: Dijkstra's, BFS and DFS.

title: Buzzy
description: A Discord bot that tracks the snipe game for Buzz Studios Film Club. The bot is hosted 24/7 handles around 400+ snipes  with 20+ active users per semester.

title: Moving Terrain
description: A web application that procedurally generates a minecraft like terrain, clouds and trees using perlin noise. I love minecraft and wanted to create procedural terrain so this is the result.

title: Supa File Tree
description: A python library that generates a file tree given a specific path as input. I created this because I couldn't find a package that allows people to do it.
